title: Better Nametag
description: A cool font style and highlighted nametag
body:
Better Nametag is a clean and practical texture pack designed to improve visibility and readability of player nametags in Minecraft. Whether you're playing survival, PvP, or exploring busy multiplayer servers, this pack ensures that nametags stand out clearly from any distance. It enhances the font style, spacing, and contrast, making names easier to read even in chaotic situations like battles or crowded areas.

This texture pack is perfect for players who rely on quick identification, helping you spot friends, teammates, or enemies without confusion. The improved clarity reduces eye strain and makes gameplay smoother, especially during long sessions. Better Nametag keeps the classic Minecraft feel while subtly upgrading the visuals, so it doesn’t feel out of place with default textures.

Lightweight and performance-friendly, it works seamlessly across most devices without causing lag or FPS drops. Installation is simple, and it is fully compatible with most versions of the game.

If you want a small but impactful upgrade to your Minecraft experience, Better Nametag is the perfect choice. It’s simple, effective, and designed to give you a clear advantage while keeping the game looking familiar and polished.
